title: [Kconfig:41-45] CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2_RX_PRIORITY missing range constraint
description: Critic: Kconfig validation gap. What: CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2_RX_PRIORITY has no 'range' constraint to validate against NUM_PREEMPT_PRIORITIES. Default 7 is reasonable but arbitrary values accepted. Why it matters: Invalid priority values could cause assertion failure in k_thread_create() or undefined scheduling behavior. Comment claims Kconfig validates via range but no range present. Fix: Add 'range 0 NUM_PREEMPT_PRIORITIES'.
close_reason: Won't fix - Kconfig 'range' directive cannot reference other Kconfig symbols like NUM_PREEMPT_PRIORITIES. Runtime validation in k_thread_create() catches invalid priority values with an assertion. The default value 7 is valid for all Zephyr configurations. Adding a static range (e.g., 0-15) would be incorrect for configs with fewer preempt priorities.
